---
title: "Compare Periods"

format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


## Setup

### Packages

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(ecmwfr)
  library(tidync)
  library(data.table)
  library(sf)
  library(arrow)
  library(units)

  library(gt)
  #library(gtExtras)
  #library(htmltools)

  library(RColorBrewer)
  library(viridis)
  library(scales) # for cut_number
  library(rnaturalearth)
})
```

### Climate Periods

```{r climate-periods}

# Climatological Standard Reference Period Normals
crp_beg <- 1961
crp_end <- 1990
crp_lbl <- paste("CRP ", crp_beg, "-", crp_end, sep = "")

# Climatological Period Average
cpa_beg <- 2011
cpa_end <- 2020
cpa_lbl <- paste("CPA ", cpa_beg, "-", cpa_end, sep = "")
```


### Paths

```{r paths}
dir_download <- "data/1-download/"
dir_transform <- "data/2-transform/"
```

### Dictionaries

```{r ktc-dictionary}

ktc_zone <- c(
    "Ar",
    "Aw",
    "BW",
    "BS",
    "Cs",
    "Cf",
    "Do",
    "Dc",
    "E",
    "Ft",
    "Fi"
  )

ktc_label <- c(
    "Ar: Tropical Wet",
    "Aw: Tropical Wet & Dry",
    "BW: Desert",
    "BS: Steppe",
    "Cs: Mediterranean",
    "Cf: Subtropical",
    "Do: Temperate Oceanic",
    "Dc: Temperate Continental",
    "E:  Sub-Arctic",
    "Ft: Polar Tundra",
    "Fi: Polar Ice Cap"
  )

ktc_dict  <- data.frame(zone= ktc_zone, label=ktc_label)
```

```{r kcc-dictionary}

kcc_zone <- c(
    "Af",
    "Am",
    "As",
    "Aw",
    "BSh",
    "BSk",
    "BWh",
    "BWk",
    "Cfa",
    "Cfb",
    "Cfc",
    "Csa",
    "Csb",
    "Csc",
    "Cwa",
    "Cwb",
    "Cwc",
    "Dfa",
    "Dfb",
    "Dfc",
    "Dfd",
    "Dsa",
    "Dsb",
    "Dsc",
    "Dsd",
    "Dwa",
    "Dwb",
    "Dwc",
    "Dwd",
    "ET",
    "EF"
  )

kcc_label <- c(
    "Af: Tropical (Rainforest)",
    "Am: Tropical (Monsoon)",
    "As: Tropical (Savanna, Dry S)",
    "Aw: Tropical (Savanna, Dry W)",
    "BSh: Dry (Semi-arid steppe Hot)",
    "BSk: Dry (Semi-arid steppe Cold)",
    "BWh: Dry (Arid desert Hot)",
    "BWk: Dry (Arid desert Cold)",
    "Cfa: Temperate (No dry season Hot S)",
    "Cfb: Temperate (No dry season Warm S)",
    "Cfc: Temperate (No dry season Cold S)",
    "Csa: Temperate (Dry summer Hot S)",
    "Csb: Temperate (Dry summer Warm S)",
    "Csc: Temperate (Dry summer Cold S)",
    "Cwa: Temperate (Dry winter Hot S)",
    "Cwb: Temperate (Dry winter Warm S)",
    "Cwc: Temperate (Dry winter Cold S)",
    "Dfa: Continental (No dry season Hot S)",
    "Dfb: Continental (No dry season Warm S)",
    "Dfc: Continental (No dry season Cold S)",
    "Dfd: Continental (No dry season Very cold S)",
    "Dsa: Continental (Dry winter Hot S)",
    "Dsb: Continental (Dry winter Warm S)",
    "Dsc: Continental (Dry winter Cold S)",
    "Dsd: Continental (Dry winter Very cold S)",
    "Dwa: Continental (Dry summer Hot S)",
    "Dwb: Continental (Dry summer Warm S)",
    "Dwc: Continental (Dry summer Cold S)",
    "Dwd: Continental (Dry summer Very cold S)",
    "ET: Polar (Tundra)",
    "EF: Polar Ice Cap"
  )

kcc_dict  <- data.frame(zone= kcc_zone, label=kcc_label)

```

### Palettes

```{r ktc palette}

 ktc_color <- c(
    "#040ff0",
    "#0474fb",
    "#ffe505",
    "#ff9005",
    "#0eff00",
    "#2db83d",
    "#b64dff",
    "#7c00ff",
    "#017783",
    "#72b8ce",
    "#b4dfe3"
  )

ktc_palette  <- data.frame(zone= ktc_zone, color=ktc_color)

```

```{r kcc palette}

 kcc_color <- c(
    "#0000fe",
    "#0277ff",
    "#7abaec",
    "#45a9f9",
    "#f5a300",
    "#ffdb63",
    "#fe0100",
    "#fe9695", 
    "#c7ff4f",
    "#66ff33",
    "#32c702",
    "#ffff00",
    "#c6c701",
    "#969600",
    "#96ff96",
    "#63c764",
    "#329633",
    "#03ffff",
    "#37c7ff",
    "#007e7d",
    "#00455e",
    "#ff00fe",
    "#c600c7",
    "#863295",
    "#966495",
    "#abb1ff",
    "#5a77db",
    "#4c51b5",
    "#320087",
    "#b2b2b2",
    "#686868"
  )

kcc_palette  <- data.frame(zone= kcc_zone, color=kcc_color)

```

### Read classified data
